title: Jazmine Kendall
text:
I am a final year Politics, Philosophy and Economics (Honours) student at The University of Queensland with a strong interest in public policy and environmental governance. I use qualitative, quantitative and spatial methods, including R, Python, and QGIS, to analyse policy challenges and support evidence-based decision-making.
This portfolio presents selected projects in data analysis, spatial analysis, and policy research.
